label: Liturgy of Basil the Great and of the Presanctified Gifts

work_wit.alt_title: Liturgy of Basil the Great and of the Presanctified Gifts
note: The preserved sections from the Liturgy of Saint Basil come from the anaphora and the dismissal rite. A notable gap occurs between fol. 142v and fol. 145r: among other items, the epiclesis and intercessions for the living and the dead (diptychs) are missing. The beginning of the Liturgy of the Presanctified Gifts is found on fol. 146v, line 19

bib.citation: Rossetto, Giulia. Greek Palimpsests at Saint Catherine’s Monastery (Sinai) Three Euchologia as Case Studies. Veröffentlichungen zur Byzanzforschung 44. Wien: Austrian Academy of Sciences Press, 2023
Arranz, Miguel. L’eucologio costantinopolitano agli inizi del secolo XI. Hagiasmatarion & Archieratikon (Rituale & Pontificale) con l’aggiunta del Leiturgikon (Messale). Rome, 1996

Goar, Jacques. Εὐχολόγιον sive Rituale Graecorum complectens ritus et ordines Divinae Liturgiae, officiorum, sacramentorum, consecrationum, benedictionum, funerum, orationum editio secunda expurgata et accuratior. Venice: Graz, 1730

program.label: Sinai Palimpsests Project
program.description: Imaged and studied as part of the Sinai Palimpsests Project (2011–2016), a collaboration between St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, the Early Manuscripts Electronic Library, and UCLA Library, funded by the Arcadia Fund and the Ahmanson Foundation. The project used multispectral imaging and scholarly analysis to recover and document erased and obscured texts in palimpsest manuscripts from the monastery’s collection.
